resources.string: Server has no id, something seems to be wrong with the server
Server version outdated: %1$s. Please update your server
Server is too slow to respond: %1$s
Unsupported server version: %1$s. Please update your server
Are you sure you want to remove the server %s?
SpatialFin is a third-party client for Jellyfin. SpatialFin by itself does not contain any media.\n\nIn order to use this client, you need to host your own Jellyfin server.
Choose how you want to start. You can set up Jellyfin now, use local files only for now, fine-tune language defaults, and decide whether to add a cloud AI key.
How do you want to use SpatialFin?
Jellyfin is still the default path, but you can skip server setup and use SpatialFin only for videos already stored on this device.
SpatialFin will continue to Jellyfin server setup after onboarding.
SpatialFin will open the local library after onboarding. You can add a Jellyfin server later.
Set your preferred language behavior now so SpatialFin can make better audio and subtitle choices from the start.
Open the language picker to add, remove, and reorder languages. The first language in the list has the highest priority.
SpatialFin can use on-device AI when available. If it is unavailable on this device, you can optionally add a Gemini API key for cloud fallback.
Local AI appears to be available on this device. You can add a cloud API key later if you want a fallback.
Local AI does not appear to be available right now. You can continue without it or add a Gemini API key now for cloud fallback.
Use a Gemini API key so SpatialFin still has AI features when on-device AI is unavailable on this headset.
Finish setup now and add a cloud API key later from Settings if you decide you want AI fallback.
Are you sure you want to remove the user %s?
Are you sure you want to remove the server address %1$s
